class.name: NavigationMeshAreaCylinder3D
class.brief_description: An axis-aligned area with a projected shape of cylinder to affect navigation mesh geometry and traversal cost (when baked).
class.description: An axis-aligned area with a projected shape of cylinder to affect navigation mesh geometry and traversal cost (when baked). [b]Note:[/b] To guarantee that the area affects the intended [NavigationMesh], make sure that 1. the area's origin is as close as possible to the source geometry, and 2. the [member NavigationMeshArea3D.navigation_layers] are different from the [NavigationRegion3D] you intend to bake with.

members.member: The radius of the projected cylinder shape. The projected area shape is extruded along the y-axis controlled by [member NavigationMeshArea3D.height]. [b]Note:[/b] The roundness of the cylinder should be expected to be only very coarse. The result is very much affected by the used navigation mesh cell grid resolution and other navigation mesh bake related properties.
